title: DSSE Envelope (OMS profile)
description: Lightweight JSON Schema for a DSSE envelope as used by OMS bundles. The canonical DSSE specification is at https://github.com/secure-systems-lab/dsse/blob/master/envelope.md — this schema captures the structural requirements without redefining the protocol semantics.

payload.description: Base64-encoded in-toto Statement. Decoded contents must conform to statement.schema.json.

payloadType.description: DSSE payload type. Fixed to the in-toto media type per the in-toto envelope spec.

keyid.description: Optional key identifier per DSSE spec. Producers MAY omit this field entirely. Verifiers MUST accept absent, empty string, or null. OMS does not use this field for verification.
